nodes.label: AI as collaborative brainstorming partner
nodes.grounding_span: I use the AI almost as a white board to talk out ideas, get options

nodes.label: AI as research and information retrieval tool
nodes.grounding_span: If i'm doing research, I more ask direct questions such as 'tell me about Russia in the 1990s brief overview'

nodes.label: AI as beta reader for constructive criticism
nodes.grounding_span: I may try to use the AI as a 'beta reader' and see if there is good constructive critism from it

nodes.label: AI understanding of user's intent
nodes.label_negative: AI misunderstanding or lack of imagination
nodes.grounding_span: the AI seems to understand what I mean which is helpful when I can't articulate

nodes.label: Creative autonomy and personal expression
nodes.grounding_span: Fiction writing is about letting others see the idea/story/scenes in my imagination

nodes.label: Efficient ideation and decision-making
nodes.grounding_span: It's also nice to see everything laid out so I can choose

nodes.label: Understanding and being understood
nodes.grounding_span: the AI seems to understand what I mean which is helpful when I can't articulate

nodes.label: Comfortable and satisfied with AI as brainstorming tool
nodes.grounding_span: I think i'm comfortable with this

nodes.label: Firm boundary against AI doing actual writing
nodes.grounding_span: I do not use the AI to do any of the actual writing

nodes.label: Openness to trying AI as beta reader
nodes.grounding_span: I may try to use the AI as a 'beta reader'

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through layered questioning
nodes.grounding_span: I usually go about 3 levels deep with the AI

nodes.label: Clear domain separation between ideation and execution
nodes.grounding_span: I do not use the AI to do any of the actual writing
